slides.title: Ukufika Kwentando Yeningi Nokubhekana Nomlando Odlule
slides.lead: Indlela iNingizimu Afrika eyaxazulula ngayo ukuphuma kobandlululo ngezingxoxo, yabamba ukhetho lwayo lwentando yeningi lokuqala ngo-1994, futhi yasebenzisa iKhomishana Yamaqiniso Nokubuyisana (Truth and Reconciliation Commission) ukubhekana nomlando wayo odlule.

media.alt: Ibhokisi levoti nejuba ngaphezu kwezwe elalihlukene lase lihlangana, okufanekisela ukuguqukela entandweni yeningi ngezingxoxo.

slides.notes: Qala ngokubeka izingxenye ezimbili ezixhumene zalesi sihloko se-CAPS. Okokuqala, 'ukufika kwentando yeningi': isivumelwano esaxoxwa ngo-1990-1994 esadiliza ubandlululo ngaphandle kwempi yombango egcwele. Okwesibili, 'ukubhekana nomlando odlule': iKhomishana Yamaqiniso Nokubuyisana, indlela iNingizimu Afrika eyayikhethe yona yobulungiswa besikhathi soguquko. Cela abafundi ukuba baphathe umbuzo owodwa wokuhlaziya kuso sonke isifundo: ingabe lolu guquko 'kwakuyisimangaliso', isivumelwano esaxoxwa, noma inguquko engaqedwanga?

slides.title: Kungani kuxoxwa? Ukuma kwezinto ngokungenampumelelo ekupheleni kweminyaka yawo-1980
slides.lead: Kungekho phakathi kombuso wobandlululo nezinhlangano zenkululeko owawungawina ngokuphelele - okwaqhubela zombili izinhlangothi ezingxoxweni.

blocks.text: Ekupheleni kweminyaka yawo-1980 ubandlululo lwalusenkingeni enkulu. Ukuvukela emalokishini nezimo zaphuthuma eziphindaphindiwe kwakhombisa ukuthi umbuso wawungakwazi ukubuyisa ukuthula, kuyilapho i-**sanctions (izijeziso), ukuhoxiswa kotshalomali** kanye nokwehla komnotho kwabuthakathaka uHulumeni. Ngasikhathi sinye, i-ANC yayingakwazi ukuketula umbuso ngamandla. Umphumela kwaba **ukuma kwezinto okulimaza zombili izinhlangothi (mutually hurting stalemate)**.

items: Ukuphela kweMpi Yomshoshaphansi (Cold War) (kusukela ngo-1989) kwasusa isimangalo sikaHulumeni sokuthi wayelwa 'nokuhlaselwa okuphelele' kweSoviet.
Izingxoxo eziyimfihlo phakathi kukaNelson Mandela owayeboshiwe noHulumeni zaqala ngaphansi kukaP.W. Botha ekupheleni kweminyaka yawo-1980.
U-F.W. de Klerk, owaba nguMongameli Wombuso ngo-1989, wathatha isinqumo sokuthi uguquko ngezingxoxo kwakuyiyona kuphela indlela esebenzayo.

slides.notes: Gcizelela imbangela nezici eziningi: ukumelana ngaphakathi, ingcindezi yomnotho, izijeziso, kanye nokushintsha kwesimo somhlaba wonke ngemva kuka-1989 konke kwahlangana. Yethula umqondo 'wokuma kwezinto okulimaza zombili izinhlangothi (mutually hurting stalemate)' ovela ocwaningweni lwezingxabano - isikhathi lapho zombili izinhlangothi ziphetha khona ngokuthi ukuqhubeka nomzabalazo kudla kakhulu kunokuvumelana. Qaphela ukuthi uMandela waqala izingxoxo zokuhlola esejele; izingxoxo azizange ziqale ngoDe Klerk yedwa. [SME] Qinisekisa ukugcizelela okuncanyelwayo nezinsuku zomhlangano kaMandela-Botha (5 Julayi 1989).

slides.title: UDe Klerk ususa ukuvinjelwa kwezinhlangano; uMandela uyakhululwa
slides.lead: Enkulumeni eyodwa ephalamende, u-F.W. de Klerk wavula umnyango wekusasa elaxoxwa ngezingxoxo.

blocks.text: Ngomhla ka-**2 Februwari 1990** uDe Klerk wasusa ukuvinjelwa kwe-**ANC, PAC, SACP** nezinye izinhlangano, wasusa imikhawulo kwabezindaba futhi wakhulula iziboshwa zezombusazwe eziningi. Emva kwezinsuku eziyisishiyagalolunye, ngomhla ka-**11 Februwari 1990**, u-**Nelson Mandela** waphuma ekhululekile emva kweminyaka engu-27 esejele.

items: Abadingiswa base bengabuya futhi izinhlangano zenkululeko zase zingahleleka obala nangokusemthethweni.
IGroote Schuur Minute (Meyi 1990) nePretoria Minute (Agasti 1990) zabeka imithetho eyisisekelo; i-ANC yamisa umzabalazo wezikhali.
Ukususa ukuvinjelwa kwakuyimbandela ebalulekile yanoma yiziphi izingxoxo ezisemthethweni.

media.alt: Isango lejele elivulekile kunenqindi ephakanyisiwe ephumayo, okufanekisela ukukhululwa kukaMandela nokususwa kokuvinjelwa kwezinhlangano.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='24' y='30' width='64' height='110' fill='#9aa77f'/><g stroke='#5c1414' stroke-width='5'><line x1='36' y1='34' x2='36' y2='140'/><line x1='52' y1='34' x2='52' y2='140'/><line x1='68' y1='34' x2='68' y2='140'/><line x1='84' y1='34' x2='84' y2='140'/></g><path d='M110 30 a70 70 0 0 1 0 110' fill='none' stroke='#c8b89a' stroke-width='4'/><g fill='#8a1f1f'><rect x='132' y='84' width='16' height='40' rx='4'/><rect x='128' y='66' width='6' height='24' rx='3'/><rect x='137' y='60' width='6' height='30' rx='3'/><rect x='146' y='64' width='6' height='26' rx='3'/><rect x='155' y='70' width='6' height='20' rx='3'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi slayidi libeka isikhathi esibalulekile soshintsho. Yenza kucace ukulandelana: ukususwa kokuvinjelwa kuqala (2 Februwari), bese kulandela ukukhululwa kukaMandela (11 Februwari). Chaza 'ama-Minutes' njengezivumelwano zokwakha ukwethembana ezenza izingxoxo zaba khona - iGroote Schuur nePretoria Minutes zabhekana nokubuya kwabadingiswa, ukukhululwa kweziboshwa nokumiswa komzabalazo wezikhali. Cela abafundi ukuthi kungani ukususwa kokuvinjelwa kwakumele kuze ngaphambi kwezingxoxo: inhlangano evinjelwe ayikwazi ukumela abantu bayo ngokusemthethweni etafuleni.

slides.title: Kusukela ezingxoxweni kuya entandweni yeningi, 1990-1998

blocks.alt: Uhlelo lwezikhathi loguquko kusukela ngo-1990 kuya ku-1998.

events.label: I-CODESA II iyavaleka (deadlock); ukubulawa kwabantu eBoipatong naseBisho; iRecord of Understanding
iMultiparty Negotiating Forum; uChris Hani uyabulawa; umthethosisekelo wesikhashana uyavunyelwana (Nov)
Ukhetho lokuqala lwentando yeningi (27 Ephreli); uMandela ubekwa esikhundleni (10 Meyi)
Izingxoxo zomphakathi ze-TRC ziyaqala; uMthethosisekelo wokugcina wamukelwa

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lolu hlelo lwezikhathi njengomgogodla wesifundo. Veza iphethini abafundi okumele bayihlaziye: izingxoxo zazingenzeki kalula noma ngokuqonda. Zaphuka ngokuphindaphindiwe (1992) zase zisindiswa (Record of Understanding), yingakho izazi-mlando zichaza uguquko njengoluntekenteke noluncike ezimeni, hhayi olwaluzokwenzeka nakanjani. Buyela kulesi slayidi njengoba isehlakalo ngasinye sixoxwa.

slides.title: Udlame nokungathembani cishe kwaphazamisa izingxoxo
slides.lead: Izingxoxo zenzeka ngaphansi kwesithombe sodlame lwezombusazwe okwathi zombili izinhlangothi zasolana ngokuluvusa.

blocks.text: Phakathi kuka-1990 no-1994 izinkulungwane zabantu zafa odlameni lwezombusazwe, ikakhulukazi ukushayisana phakathi kwabalandeli be-ANC ne-**Inkatha Freedom Party (IFP)**, okusolwa ukuthi kwavuswa **'ibutho lesithathu' (third force)** ngaphakathi kwezokuphepha. Ukubulawa kwabantu okubili ngo-1992 kwaletha izingxoxo emphethweni.

items: Ukubulawa kwabantu eBoipatong (17 Juni 1992): cishe izakhamuzi ezingu-45 zabulawa; i-ANC yamisa izingxoxo.
Ukubulawa kwabantu eBisho (7 Septhemba 1992): amasosha aseCiskei adubula abamashi be-ANC, abulala cishe abantu abangu-28.
Amaqembu abamhlophe angakwesokudla nabaholi bamaHomeland basongela ukubhidliza noma yisiphi isivumelwano.

media.alt: Itafula lezingxoxo elidabukile, elifanekisela izingxoxo eziphukayo ngaphansi kwengcindezi yodlame lwezombusazwe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='70' width='160' height='16' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='44' y='86' width='10' height='48' fill='#7a5a3a'/><rect x='166' y='86' width='10' height='48' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M108 70 L100 54 L116 54 Z' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M110 70 L104 86 M110 70 L118 86' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M108 54 L112 40 L104 40 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi slayidi sithuthukisa iphuzu lokuhlaziya lokuthi uguquko lwalungahluleka. Chaza isimangalo 'sebutho lesithathu' - ubufakazi bokuthi izingxenye zamabutho ezokuphepha zavusa udlame ngasese ukuze zibuthakathaka i-ANC. IBoipatong yabangela ukuphuma kwe-ANC ezingxoxweni kanye nesikhathi 'sokusebenza kwesixuku okuqhubekayo (rolling mass action)'. IBisho yaveza ingozi yezakhiwo zamaHomeland. Gcizelela ukuthi izinqumo zobuholi zokubuyela etafuleni, nakuba kunalezi zicunulo, yikho okwasindisa isivumelwano. [SME] Izibalo zabalimele eBoipatong zivame ukubekwa ngu-45; qinisekisa isibalo umnyango wakho osincamelayo.

slides.title: CODESA I ne-CODESA II
slides.lead: IConvention for a Democratic South Africa (CODESA) kwakungumzamo wokuqala wamaqembu amaningi wokuxoxisana ngohlelo olusha lomthethosisekelo.

blocks.text: I-**CODESA I** yahlangana ngomhla ka-20-21 Disemba 1991 eWorld Trade Centre eKempton Park, lapho amaqembu amaningi asayina khona i-**Declaration of Intent** ezibophezela eNingizimu Afrika engahlukene, enentando yeningi. I-**CODESA II** (Meyi 1992) yase iwohloka ngokuvaleka **(deadlock)**.

items: Amaqembu ayengavumelani ngobuningi bamavoti obudingekayo ukwamukela umthethosisekelo omusha nangokwabelana ngamandla.
UHulumeni wayefuna ukuvikeleka okuqinile kwabambalwa; i-ANC yayifuna ukubusa kweningi okucacile.
I-IFP nabanye abaholi bamaHomeland babengakhululekile ngombuso omaphakathi oqinile.

media.alt: Itafula eliyindilinga lezingxoxo elizungezwe yizihlalo zemibala ehlukene, elimela amaqembu amaningi ahlangana e-CODESA.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><ellipse cx='100' cy='84' rx='60' ry='30' fill='#7a8b5a'/><ellipse cx='100' cy='80' rx='60' ry='30' fill='#9aa77f'/><g><circle cx='40' cy='80' r='9' fill='#8a1f1f'/><circle cx='70' cy='52' r='9' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='100' cy='46' r='9' fill='#e8a13a'/><circle cx='130' cy='52' r='9' fill='#3f6b45'/><circle cx='160' cy='80' r='9' fill='#5c1414'/><circle cx='130' cy='108' r='9' fill='#c8b89a'/><circle cx='70' cy='108' r='9' fill='#b7a98d'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza i-CODESA njengeyamaqembu amaningi (hhayi nje i-ANC noHulumeni): cishe izithunywa ezingu-19 zabamba iqhaza, kubandakanya nezakhiwo zamaHomeland namaqembu amancane. I-Declaration of Intent yayiyimpumelelo yangempela yendawo evamile. Kodwa i-CODESA II yaphuka ngenxa yombuzo obucayi-kodwa-obalulekile wobuningi bamavoti obukhethekile obudingekayo ukubhala umthethosisekelo - okwakumele umzabalazo ojulile phakathi kokubusa kweningi ne-veto yabambalwa. Xhuma ukuvaleka nesizathu sokuthi kungani kwadingeka enye inkundla (i-MPNF) ngo-1993.

slides.eyebrow: Ukusindisa izingxoxo - ekupheleni kuka-1992 kuya ku-1993
slides.title: IRecord of Understanding ne-MPNF
slides.lead: Emva kokuphuka kuka-1992, ukwakha ukwethembana phakathi kwezinhlangothi ezimbili kanye nenkundla entsha kwabuyisela uguquko emzileni.

blocks.text: Ngomhla ka-**26 Septhemba 1992** uMandela noDe Klerk basayina i-**Record of Understanding**, isivumelwano phakathi kwezinhlangothi ezimbili mayelana neziboshwa, amahostela nokuphathwa kwezikhali okwabuyisa amandla. Izingxoxo zaqhubeka ngo-1993 nge-**Multiparty Negotiating Forum (MPNF)**.

items: I-Record of Understanding yabekela eceleni i-IFP, eyahoxa ezingxoxweni ngokubhikisha isikhathi esithile.
U-Cyril Ramaphosa (ANC) no-Roelf Meyer (uHulumeni) baba umgudu obalulekile phakathi kwamaqembu amabili amakhulu.
Ukubulawa komholi we-SACP uChris Hani ngomhla ka-10 Ephreli 1993 kwakhuphula ingozi futhi kwaphoqa amaqembu ukuba abeke usuku lokhetho ngokushesha.

slides.notes: Gcizelela inqubo: ukushintsha kusukela ku-CODESA yamaqembu amaningi eyahluleka kuya enhlanganweni yezivumelwano eziqinile zezinhlangothi ezimbili (Record of Understanding) kanye nenkundla ebanzi (MPNF). Gqamisa 'umgudu' kaRamaphosa-Meyer njengesibonelo sokuthi ukwethembana komuntu siqu phakathi kwabaxoxi kwakubaluleke kanjani. Hlaziya ukubulawa kukaHani njengepharadokisi - isikhathi esasingavusa impi yombango kodwa isicelo sikaMandela sokuzola esasakazwa kumabonakude sasiguqula saba yingcindezi yokubeka usuku lokhetho oluqinile (olwamenyezelwa ngokushesha emva kwalokho). [SME] Qinisekisa indlela yokwethula ukuphuma kwe-IFP nokubuya kwayo kamuva.

slides.title: Ukuvumelana okwenza intando yeningi yakwazeka
slides.lead: Intando yeningi yavikeleka ngeziqinisekiso ezaxoxwa ezaqinisekisa umbuso owawuphuma.

blocks.heading: Sunset clauses
blocks.text: Isiphakamiso sikaJoe Slovo sango-1992: uHulumeni Wobumbano Lukazwelonke kanye nokuvikeleka kwemisebenzi yezisebenzi zikahulumeni isikhathi esibekiwe, kudambisa ukwesaba kwabamhlophe koshintsho olusheshayo.

blocks.heading: Umthethosisekelo wesikhashana
blocks.text: Wamukelwa ngomhla ka-18 Novemba 1993, wabeka imigomo engu-34 umthethosisekelo wokugcina okwakumele uyifeze futhi wakha uhlaka lokhetho luka-1994.

blocks.heading: UHulumeni Wobumbano Lukazwelonke
blocks.text: Amaqembu anamavoti angaphezu kuka-5% athola izihlalo zekhabhinethi; lawo angaphezu kuka-20% ayengaqamba iphini likamongameli - ukwabelana ngamandla iminyaka emihlanu.

slides.notes: Le yinhliziyo yokuhlaziya yokufika kwentando yeningi. Chaza 'ama-sunset clauses': umholi we-SACP uJoe Slovo waphikisa ngokuthi i-ANC kufanele inikeze ukuvumelana - ukwabelana ngamandla neziqinisekiso zezisebenzi zikahulumeni ezikhona namabutho ezokuphepha - ukuze kususwe isishukumisi sohlangothi olwehlulwayo sokubhidliza isivumelwano. Xoxisana nabafundi: ingabe lokhu kuvumelana kwakuyintengo esebenzayo yokudlulisela amandla ngokuthula, noma kwaqinisa izingxenye zombuso omdala kwabambezela uguquko? [SME] Qinisekisa amazwi omkhawulo wezihlalo zekhabhinethi we-GNU (amaqembu angaphezu kuka-5% athole izihlalo zekhabhinethi; angaphezu kuka-20% athole iphini likamongameli).

slides.title: Ukhetho lokuqala lwentando yeningi
slides.lead: Okokuqala ngqa, abantu baseNingizimu Afrika bazo zonke izinhlanga bavota okhethweni olulodwa lukazwelonke.

blocks.text: Ukuvota kwenzeka izinsuku eziningana, kanti u-**27 Ephreli 1994** kwaba usuku olukhulu lokuvota - manje osugujwa njenge-**Freedom Day (uSuku Lwenkululeko)**. I-IFP yavuma ukubamba iqhaza kuphela ezinsukwini ezimbalwa ngaphambi kokhetho, futhi igama layo lafakwa emavotini ngesitikha. Isibalo sabavoti sasikhulu, kunemigqa emide, ebekezelayo ezweni lonke.

items: Cishe amavoti asemthethweni angu-19.7 million afakwa okhethweni oluthule.
Kwakungukhetho olusungulayo, olungelona olobuhlanga ngaphansi kwelungelo lokuvota labo bonke abantu abadala.
Ukhetho lwaletha ubufanele ubandlululo obabungenabo emashumini eminyaka obabusa.

media.alt: Umgqa omude wabavoti ozombelela uya endaweni yokuvota ngosuku lokhetho.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='176' y='58' width='48' height='62' fill='#9aa77f'/><rect x='190' y='74' width='20' height='46' fill='#5c1414'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='30' cy='96' r='8'/><rect x='24' y='106' width='12' height='24'/><circle cx='58' cy='94' r='8'/><rect x='52' y='104' width='12' height='26'/><circle cx='86' cy='96' r='8'/><rect x='80' y='106' width='12' height='24'/><circle cx='114' cy='94' r='8'/><rect x='108' y='104' width='12' height='26'/><circle cx='142' cy='96' r='8'/><rect x='136' y='106' width='12' height='24'/></g><path d='M18 132 q80 -8 150 -14' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Dlulisa amandla obuntu nawophawu ka-27 Ephreli: izithombe zemigqa emide ngamakhilomitha, abantu abadala bevota okokuqala. Chaza ukubamba iqhaza kwe-IFP ngomzuzu wokugcina, okwavimbela ukugwema kanye nodlame olungenzeka KwaZulu-Natal. Xoxa ngobufanele njengomqondo obalulekile - ohulumeni bobandlululo abazange bakhethwe iningi labantu baseNingizimu Afrika, ngakho lolu khetho 'lwalusungula' ngoba lwadala umbuso iningi elaluwubona njengowalo. [SME] Isibalo esivame ukushiwo samavoti asemthethweni singaba yi-19.7 million; qinisekisa ngomthombo umnyango osincamelayo.

slides.title: Umphumela noHulumeni Wobumbano Lukazwelonke
slides.lead: I-ANC yawina iningi elicacile, futhi uhulumeni wokwabelana ngamandla waqala ukusebenza ngaphansi kukaNelson Mandela.

blocks.text: I-**ANC yawina cishe u-62.6%** wamavoti, i-**National Party cishe u-20.4%**, kanti i-**IFP cishe u-10.5%**. Njengoba kwakuvunyelwene, kwakhiwa u-**Hulumeni Wobumbano Lukazwelonke**. UNelson Mandela wabekwa esikhundleni njengoMongameli ngomhla ka-**10 Meyi 1994**, noThabo Mbeki no-F.W. de Klerk bengamaphini kamongameli.

items: I-ANC yawina iningi kodwa hhayi izingxenye ezimbili kwezintathu (two-thirds) ezazidingeka ukubhala umthethosisekelo wokugcina yodwa.
I-NP ne-IFP zombili zathatha izihlalo ekhabhinethi ngaphansi kwesivumelwano sokwabelana ngamandla.
UMthethosisekelo wokugcina, ohlonipha imigomo eyavunyelwana ngayo, wamukelwa ngo-1996.

slides.notes: Nikeza abafundi imiphumela emikhulu kodwa ugxile ekuhlaziyeni imiphumela yayo. Iningi le-ANC lalingafinyeleli ezingxenyeni ezimbili kwezintathu, okwakusho ukuthi umthethosisekelo wokugcina wawusadinga ukuxoxwa e-Constitutional Assembly - okwaqinisa ipolitiki yokuvumelana. Qaphela ukuthi i-NP kaDe Klerk yahoxa kamuva ku-GNU ngo-1996, okwakhombisa imikhawulo yokwabelana ngamandla okuphoqelelwe. Xhuma uMthethosisekelo wango-1996 emuva emigomeni engu-34 eyavunyelwana ngayo emthethweni-sisekelo wesikhashana. [SME] Amaphesenti amavoti (ANC 62.65%, NP 20.39%, IFP 10.54%) abikwa kabanzi; qinisekisa izibalo ezicacile.

slides.title: Ukusungulwa kweKhomishana Yamaqiniso Nokubuyisana (Truth and Reconciliation Commission)
slides.lead: Esikhundleni sokuquliswa kwamacala njengaseNuremberg noma ukuxolelwa okuphelele, iNingizimu Afrika yakhetha ukubalana obala nomlando wayo.

blocks.cite: UMbhishobhi Omkhulu Desmond Tutu, uSihlalo we-TRC

blocks.text: I-TRC yasungulwa ngo-**Promotion of National Unity and Reconciliation Act (Act 34 of 1995)** futhi yayiholwa ngu-**Mbhishobhi Omkhulu Desmond Tutu**. Inhloso yayo kwakuwukwakha isithombe esiphelele ngangokunokwenzeka sokwephulwa okukhulu kwamalungelo abantu okwenzeka phakathi kuka-1960 no-1994, nokukhuthaza ubumbano lukazwelonke nokubuyisana.

items: Yanikeza 'indlela yesithathu' phakathi kokuquliswa kwecala kwawo wonke umuntu (ubulungiswa bempindiselo) nokukhohlwa (ukuxolelwa okuphelele).
Indlela yayo yayithatha emibonweni yobulungiswa obubuyisayo (restorative justice) nomqondo we-ubuntu.
Izisulu zanikwa ithuba obala lokuxoxa izindaba zazo nokwamukelwa ngokusemthethweni.

slides.notes: Beka i-TRC njengobulungiswa besikhathi soguquko - izinqumo umphakathi ozenzayo ngokuziphendulela lapho usuka embusweni ongqongqo uya entandweni yeningi. Qhathanisa kafushane nezinye izindlela: ukuquliswa kwamacala ohlobo lwaseNuremberg (okwakungabeka engozini isivumelwano namabutho ezokuphepha) uma kuqhathaniswa nokuxolelwa okuvamile nokuthula (okwakwenqabela izisulu ubulungiswa namaqiniso). Chaza ubulungiswa obubuyisayo ne-ubuntu njengesisekelo sefilosofi uTutu asigcizelela. Qaphela ukuthi igunya lafaka ukwephulwa kwamalungelo yizo zonke izinhlangothi, kubandakanya nezinhlangano zenkululeko, hhayi umbuso wodwa.

slides.title: Amakomiti amathathu, inqubo eyodwa
slides.lead: IKhomishana yaqoqa amaqiniso ngobufakazi obenziwa obala kanye nokuxolelwa okunemibandela.

blocks.heading: Ukwephulwa Kwamalungelo Abantu
blocks.text: Lezwa ubufakazi bezisulu nabasindile ezinkundleni zomphakathi ezithinta imizwa ezazisakazwa esizweni kusukela ngo-1996.

blocks.heading: Ukuxolelwa (Amnesty)
blocks.text: Lalinganikeza ukuxolelwa kwababone icala ababeveza konke ngokugcwele ngamacala aqhutshwa yizombusazwe - amaqiniso ashintshaniswa nenkululeko ekuqulisweni kwecala.

blocks.heading: Ukubuyiselwa Nokuvuselelwa
blocks.text: Lanconyelwa ukuthi izisulu kufanele zisekelwe futhi zinxeshezelwe kanjani umbuso.

media.alt: Imakrofoni phambi kwesixuku, emela ubufakazi bomphakathi ezinkundleni ze-TRC.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='94' y='58' width='12' height='46' rx='6' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='96' y='104' width='8' height='24' fill='#5c1414'/><rect x='84' y='128' width='32' height='6' rx='3' fill='#5c1414'/><path d='M84 78 a16 16 0 0 0 32 0' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='3'/><g fill='#c8b89a'><circle cx='40' cy='118' r='7'/><circle cx='62' cy='120' r='7'/><circle cx='138' cy='120' r='7'/><circle cx='160' cy='118' r='7'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ukushintshana okubalulekile nokuphikisanayo okusenhliziyweni ye-TRC: ukuxolelwa okunemibandela. Ukuxolelwa kwakungenzeki ngokuzenzakalelayo - abafakisicelo kwakumele baveze ngokugcwele amaqiniso ngezenzo ezazilinganisiwe futhi zaqhutshwa yizombusazwe. Qhathanisa izinkundla zezisulu ezithinta imizwa kakhulu (Komiti Yokwephulwa Kwamalungelo Abantu) nezinkundla zokuxolelwa ezisekelwe emthethweni kakhudlwana. Buza abafundi: ingabe ukushintshanisa ukuxolelwa ngamaqiniso kuyintengo enobulungiswa? Isisulu sizuzani, futhi silahlekelwa yini?

slides.title: I-TRC: impumelelo nokugxekwa
slides.lead: I-TRC iyabongwa emhlabeni wonke, kodwa izazi-mlando nabantu baseNingizimu Afrika basaphikisana ngokuthi yazuza kangakanani.

blocks.text: IKhomishana yezwa izitatimende ezingaphezu kuka-20,000 futhi yanikezela ngo-**mbiko wayo omkhulu wokugcina ngo-Okthoba 1998** (kunemiqulu eyengeziwe kamuva). Yabhala phansi izenzo zonya ezaziphikwe, yanika izisulu ukwamukelwa obala, futhi yasiza ukuvimbela umjikelezo wempindiselo. Nokho umbiko wayo uyaphikiswana.

items: Impumelelo: yaveza amaqiniso afihliwe, yenza izisulu zaba ngabantu, futhi yanikeza indlela yokubalana ngokuthula efundwa emhlabeni wonke.
Ukugxekwa: ukuxolelwa kwenqabela eminye imindeni ubulungiswa; ukunxeshezelwa kwezisulu kwabonwa kabanzi njengokuhamba kancane nokunganele.
Ababone icala abaningi ababalulekile benqaba ukubambisana, futhi abanye babuza ukuthi ngempela 'ukubuyisana' kwafinyelelwa yini.

slides.notes: Hola abafundi ekwahluleleni okulinganisiwe, okusekelwe ebufakazini kunesinqumo esilula. Impumelelo: ukwamukela, ukwakha umbiko, kanye nokugwema ukuchitheka kwegazi kwempindiselo. Ukugxekwa: izisulu zazivame ukuzizwa zikhwatshanisiwe lapho ababone icala bekhululeka emva kokuvuma, nalapho ukunxeshezelwa okwakuthenjisiwe kuhamba kancane. Abanye baphikisa ngokuthi i-TRC yathola 'amaqiniso' ngaphezu 'kokubuyisana', nokuthi ayizange ibhekane nefa lezomnotho elakhelwe ubandlululo. Khuthaza abafundi ukuba balinganise zombili izinhlangothi. [SME] Qinisekisa izibalo zezitatimende/zezinkundla nosuku olucacile lokunikezelwa kombiko wokugcina (Okthoba 1998; imiqulu eyengeziwe 2003).

slides.title: Intando yeningi eyaxoxwa nokubalana okungaqedwanga
slides.lead: INingizimu Afrika yagwema impi yombango ngokuvumelana, yase izama ukwelapha ngokukhuluma amaqiniso - kokubili lokhu okwafezwa kusaphikiswana ngakho.

blocks.text: Uguquko luka-1990-1994 lukhombisa umlando owenziwa yizinqumo zabantu ngaphansi kwengcindezi: ukuma kwezinto, impumelelo enkulu, ukuphuka okuphindaphindiwe, kanye nokuvumelana okwazuzwa kanzima okwakhiqiza ukhetho lwentando yeningi nohulumeni wokwabelana ngamandla. I-**TRC** yase izama ukubhekana nomlando odlule ngamaqiniso kunempindiselo - ukuhlolwa okunesibindi impumelelo namaphutha akho asaphikiswana ngawo nanamuhla.

blocks.question: Chaza ukuthi kungani izingxoxo phakathi kuka-1990 no-1994 zingachazwa njengezintekenteke nezaziphazamiseka kalula. Bhekisela okungenani ezehlakalweni ezimbili ezithize.
Zazisebenza kangakanani 'ama-sunset clauses' noHulumeni Wobumbano Lukazwelonke ekuvikeleni uguquko oluthule oluya entandweni yeningi?
'I-TRC yathola amaqiniso kodwa hhayi ukubuyisana okuphelele.' Uyavuma? Sekela umbono wakho ngobufakazi.

slides.notes: Hlanganisa izingxenye ezimbili zesihloko: ukufika kwentando yeningi (isivumelwano sezombusazwe esaxoxwa, esincike ezimeni) nokubhekana nomlando odlule (ubulungiswa besikhathi soguquko nge-TRC). Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu ukuhlola amakhono okuhlaziya imithombo nokubhala okwandisiwe ezingeni leBanga 12; ukwabiwa kwamamaki kufanekisela izindlela ze-CAPS zesindaba nezindima. Khumbuza abafundi ukuthi kokubili ukuvumelana okwaxoxwa nomsebenzi ongaqedwanga we-TRC kuxhumene ngqo nezimpikiswano zaseNingizimu Afrika yanamuhla.
